context.rationale: Phase 4 routed Phase 3 adversary FAIL findings (FIND-003, FIND-010) back to Phase 1a. Spec was refined to revision 4 (behavioral-spec.md) and revision 4 (verification-architecture.md). Re-running spec review gate to confirm the refinements adequately resolve the routed findings and do not introduce new ambiguity.

routedFindings.summary: Pipeline calls Clock.now() between Step 2 and Step 3, contradicting REQ-015 I/O confinement (which only permitted Steps 1, 2, 4)
routedFindings.specResolution: behavioral-spec.md REQ-015 amended to explicitly permit one inter-step Clock.now call between Steps 2 and 3 (Option A). Adds AC-3 (≤2 Clock.now calls per run) and AC-4 (hydrateFeed accepts no timestamp argument). verification-architecture.md adds Inter-step row to Purity Boundary Map and adds PROP-023 (Tier 1, required: true) to verify the Clock.now call budget.

routedFindings.summary: REQ-004 silent on how statDir Err(disk-full|lock|unknown) maps; implementation collapses to path-not-found without spec authority
routedFindings.specResolution: behavioral-spec.md REQ-004 EARS expanded to enumerate Err(disk-full|lock|unknown) → path-not-found (collapsed) with explicit rationale table. Adds 3 ACs (one per collapsed kind). Rejects alternative 'unavailable' reason. verification-architecture.md statDir port docstring updated; PROP-024 (Tier 1, required: false) added to verify the 7-row mapping.

domainSourceOfTruth: docs/domain/aggregates.md §1 衝突回避設計, §4 vault.allocateNoteId

instructions.scope: Review specs/behavioral-spec.md (revision 4) and specs/verification-architecture.md (revision 4) ONLY. Do NOT read source code under promptnotes/ — Phase 3 will re-review the implementation later.
focus: Confirm FIND-003 is fully addressed (REQ-015 EARS now matches the inter-step allowance; AC-3/AC-4 are testable; PROP-023 is well-formed).
Confirm FIND-010 is fully addressed (REQ-004 EARS + AC table cover all 7 statDir outcomes; PROP-024 enumerates the same 7 cases).
Detect any new spec ambiguity introduced by these amendments.
Confirm prior PASS findings (F-001..F-005) remain resolved — no regression.
Verify coverage matrix completeness: every REQ has ≥1 PROP; every PROP traces to ≥1 REQ.
instructions.outputContract: Write reviews/spec/iteration-3/output/verdict.json with the standard schema: feature, iteration, phase, reviewer, reviewedAt, mode, dimensions{spec_fidelity, verification_readiness}, overallVerdict, priorFindingStatus (FIND-003, FIND-010, plus F-001..F-005 regression check), newFindings (if any), judgment.
